emails.subject: Re: Internet Service
emails.body: Have you decided what you are going to do? Forwarded by Stacy E Dickson/HOU/ECT on 01/11/2001 03:48 PM ClickAtHomePilot2@ENRON Sent by: Stacey Dempsey@ENRON 01/11/2001 09:38 AM

emails.subject: Re: Internet Service
emails.body: So you only email me when you want something. No, I do not know what I am going to do. They tell me Time Warner Cable Modem service is not available in my area, however, Time Warner tells me it is. They tell me that I can sign up for DSL and expense it on my expense account until they allow it sometimes next month. I guess I need to talk with them some more about which is better. People tell me the cable modem service is actually faster than the response we currently have in the office. Let me know what you decide to do, so that I can ponder the reasons for your choice. Stacy E Dickson 01/11/2001 03:49 PM

emails.subject: Re: Internet Service
emails.body: I believe Tuesday is the only day that I have open. Let me know if that works for you. Stacy E Dickson 01/12/2001 03:02 PM

emails.subject: Re: Internet Service
emails.body: Enjoyed having lunch. I got back and Time Warner was available for my zip code, so I signed up for Time Warner Road Runner internet service. The price is $15.00 per month plus installation. I will let you know when it is hooked up. Are you sure that you want to come back to the rat race. It has to be a lot of fun staying home and playing with the baby. That will all change if you decide to come back to work. See you. Forwarded by Dan J Hyvl/HOU/ECT on 01/16/2001 02:21 PM Stacy E Dickson 01/11/2001 03:49 PM
